name: Vale
quote: With Psynergy, the more you practice, the more you learn.

name: Vault
quote: Welcome to Vault, the town at the heart of Angara.

name: Kolima
quote: If I could speak, I'd tell them this is Kolima, village of lumberjacks!\n- Small Tree

name: Imil
quote: There's been an epidemic going around Imil. You should leave right away if you don't want to catch it.

name: Xian
quote: This is Xian. Travelers are welcome here! Relax. Stay long.

name: Tolbi
quote: Hmm? Do you want to test your luck at Tolbi Spring? ... Really? Well then, I'll give you the chance to go first.

name: Lalivero
quote: You are leaving after all, aren't you... You are welcome in Lalivero anytime.

name: Air's Rock
quote: The longer I sit here gazing at Air's Rock, the more I grow to love it. All it takes is one glance, and you're convinced it holds some mystery deep within.

name: Gaia Rock
quote: Legend has it that Mt. Mikage is enshrouded by a mysterious power. I wonder if that's the source of the serpent's eternal life.

name: Aqua Rock
quote: He always wanted to climb to the peak of the mountain on Aqua Island. But he spent all his time studying that Aqua Stone instead. I always wondered why.

name: Magma Rock
quote: On the far side of the river lies a huge mountain we call Magma Rock. It is a sacred place that the gods created long ago.
